title: membership — retention windows
description: Active + paused memberships never expire. Terminal memberships retain 7 years post-transition (SOX 404 + tax audit). Enterprise extends to 10 years via `membership_extended_retention` entitlement. Renewals + passes co-terminate with their parent membership. Refund + chargeback records survive tenant erasure in the compliance archive.

purge.trigger: > 7 years past cancelled_at (or > 10 years when `membership_extended_retention` on)
purge.action: hard delete via retention module + compliance archive stub for refund records

purge.notes: Lapsed lifetime_value_cents preserved in analytics archive (aggregated, non-PII).
Refund records themselves live in compliance archive with distinct retention (10 years universal for chargeback + refund records — regulatory floor).

purge.trigger: > 7 years past archive AND no membership references remain
> 7 years past created_at + parent membership eligible for purge
purge.notes: Failed renewals preserved for the full retention window — dunning-effectiveness analytics need multi-year lookback.

extended_retention.description: Enterprise tenants may hold `membership_extended_retention` to extend all terminal-membership retention windows from 7 to 10 years. This applies uniformly to memberships + renewals; does NOT change consumed-pass retention (7 already covers audit); does NOT change unused-pass retention.

cross_reference: TenantErased cascades hard-delete of every membership + plan + renewal + pass. Refund + chargeback records survive in compliance archive with 10-year regulatory floor.
AthleteArchived + cascade=true triggers soft-cancel of active memberships; terminal transition sets standard 7-year retention timer.
compliance module owns the refund + chargeback archive — retention there is a distinct policy that outlives this module's retention window.
